description: Search for flights across multiple providers

args.from: Origin airport IATA code (e.g. EZE, JFK, LHR)
args.to: Destination airport IATA code (e.g. JFK, CDG, NRT)
args.return: Return date YYYY-MM-DD (OPTIONAL — omit this key entirely for one-way flights)

routerHints: For IATA codes: use the main airport code (Buenos Aires → EZE, New York → JFK, London → LHR, etc.). Dates must be YYYY-MM-DD. If no year given, use the current or next occurrence. dd/mm format (Spanish/Argentine): day/month not month/day. If NO return date is mentioned, omit the 'return' arg entirely (one-way search). Only include 'return' if the user explicitly mentions a return date.
